steps: Dispense the mixture as 500 ml batches into desired 1L bottles.

Always add vitamins fresh and keep the medium at 4 °C . Be sure to work under a laminar flow hood of this step. Using pre-plugged sterile tips mix the following as a cocktail in a 1.5 ml sterile microcentrifuge: 1000 µL, Thiamine (Vitamin B1) 100 µL, Biotin (Vitamin B7) 100 µL, Cyanocobalamin
Add 950 mL, Initial MilliQ water to a 2L beaker.
Adjust the pH to pH 7.8 with NaOH. Make sure this is done under mild mixing.
Adjust the final volume to 1000 mL .
Add the vitamins to the SVM-vit.
Keep the medium at 4 °C until you are ready to use it.
